Get in touch

Questions about terramation, the campaign, or advertising with us? We'd love to hear from you.

Close the Circle campaign

We're working to make human composting a legal end-of-life choice in the UK. Add your voice and help us push for change — every supporter makes a difference.

✉️
Email us info@terramationuk.com
📢
Advertise with us

Audiences are actively searching for sustainable funeral options. Get in touch to reach them with your services.

🌿
Our mission

Terramation UK educates the public on human composting and campaigns for its legalisation in England and Wales.

Send us a message

Join 100,000+ supporters

Our petition has already gathered over 100,000 signatures. Sign up to stay informed and find out how to take action.

Championing human composting and sustainable end-of-life choices in the United Kingdom. Our Close the Circle campaign is working to make terramation legal for everyone.
